description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rust:latest Docker image. Define a pages job that runs in the default stage, executes `cargo doc` then `mv target/doc/ public/`, publishes the `public/` directory as a Pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch. Add a test:cargo job that also runs in the default stage and runs `rustc --version && cargo --version`, `cargo build --all`, and `cargo test --all --verbose`. No caches, services, or additional variables are needed.
